ivf.title: IVF (In Vitro Fertilisation)
ivf.description: The gold-standard fertility treatment — eggs are fertilised with sperm in our laboratory to create quality embryos for transfer.
ivf.benefit: 65% success rate — the highest in Tashkent

diagnostics.title: Infertility Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Complete diagnostic workup for couples: hormone panels, ultrasound, semen analysis and genetic screening.

female.title: Female Infertility Treatment
female.description: Specialised treatment for PCOS, endometriosis, diminished ovarian reserve and uterine conditions.
female.benefit: Treatment protocol tailored individually to each woman

male.title: Male Infertility Treatment
male.description: Semen analysis, andrologist consultation and advanced micromanipulation technologies.
male.benefit: 90% of male infertility cases are treatable

preparation.title: IVF Preparation Programme
preparation.description: Comprehensive pre-IVF preparation: health optimisation, supplements, stress management and psychological support.
preparation.benefit: Preparation significantly increases your chances of success

pgt.title: Embryo Genetics (PGT)
pgt.description: Identifying genetic defects before embryo transfer — the most reliable path to a healthy baby.

hysteroscopy.title: Hysteroscopy
hysteroscopy.description: Endoscopic examination and treatment of the uterus — minimally invasive, go home the same day.
hysteroscopy.benefit: Minimal discomfort, fast recovery, precise results

hormones.title: Hormonal Testing
hormones.description: Full panel of AMH, FSH, LH, prolactin and other reproductive hormones — assess ovarian reserve accurately.
hormones.benefit: Complete picture of reproductive health in one visit

gynConsult.title: Reproductive Gynaecology Consultation
gynConsult.description: In-depth consultation with a specialist on infertility, recurrent pregnancy loss and reproductive health.
gynConsult.benefit: Your questions — clear answers and next steps

androConsult.title: Reproductive Andrology Consultation

process.heading: The IVF Journey: We're With You Every Step
process.subheading: 8 clear steps — from your first consultation to your positive result

step1.title: Consultation & Diagnosis
step1.description: Our specialist carefully reviews your medical history, test results and questions. A detailed, personalised treatment plan is created.

step2.title: Preparation & Testing
step2.description: Blood tests, ultrasound, semen analysis and all necessary diagnostics are completed. Your body is fully prepared for IVF.

step3.title: Ovarian Stimulation
step3.description: Hormonal medication brings several eggs to maturity simultaneously. Doctors monitor progress continuously with ultrasound.

step4.title: Egg Retrieval
step4.description: Mature eggs are collected under ultrasound guidance, painlessly. The procedure is brief and safe.

step5.title: Laboratory Fertilisation
step5.description: An embryologist combines the eggs with sperm, and the fertilised cells develop in a specialised incubator.

step6.title: Embryo Development
step6.description: Fertilised cells are observed for 3–5 days. Quality embryos are prepared for transfer.

step7.title: Embryo Transfer
step7.description: A quality embryo is placed into the uterus via a fine catheter. The procedure is painless and takes 15–20 minutes.

step8.title: HCG Test & Result
step8.description: 10–14 days after transfer, a blood test confirms the pregnancy. This is the moment our patients — and our whole team — have been working towards.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Clear and honest answers to your most important questions

whatIsIvf.question: What is IVF?
whatIsIvf.answer: IVF (In Vitro Fertilisation) is a reproductive technology in which eggs are fertilised with sperm in laboratory conditions, and the resulting embryo is transferred to the uterus. It is the most thoroughly studied and effective fertility treatment, and has helped millions of families worldwide.

whoIsItFor.question: Who is IVF suitable for?
whoIsItFor.answer: IVF is recommended for blocked or absent fallopian tubes, PCOS (polycystic ovary syndrome), endometriosis, male infertility, unexplained infertility, when other treatments have not succeeded, and when there is a risk of genetic disease. At your consultation our specialist will determine whether IVF is right for your situation.

howLong.question: How long does the IVF process take?
howLong.answer: A standard IVF protocol takes 4–6 weeks. The full cycle from your first consultation to the HCG test — including stimulation (10–14 days), egg retrieval, lab stage, embryo transfer and waiting for results — may take 6–8 weeks in total. An exact schedule is created individually at your consultation.

isPainful.question: Is IVF painful?
isPainful.answer: Most patients tolerate IVF well. Egg retrieval is performed under local or general anaesthesia and is painless. Embryo transfer is similar to a routine gynaecological procedure — painless and taking 15–20 minutes. During hormonal stimulation, some patients feel pressure in the ovarian area, which is normal.

tests.question: What tests are needed for IVF?
tests.answer: Key tests include: blood type and Rh factor, full blood count and biochemistry, hormone panel (AMH, FSH, LH, prolactin, thyroid hormones), ultrasound of the uterus and ovaries, semen analysis, infection screening (HIV, hepatitis, TORCH), and genetic counselling if indicated. The complete list is tailored individually.

successFactors.question: What affects IVF success?
successFactors.answer: Key factors include: the woman's age (success rates are higher under 35), egg and embryo quality, uterine condition, sperm quality, the type of protocol chosen, and laboratory quality and embryologist expertise. At Miracle IVF the average success rate is 65%. Your individual prognosis is discussed at consultation.

regional.question: Can patients from outside Tashkent apply?
regional.answer: Yes, absolutely. We welcome patients from all regions of Uzbekistan and neighbouring countries. Remote consultations (video or phone) are available. Before travelling to Tashkent you can have an online consultation and receive your test list. We also assist with accommodation recommendations and flexible scheduling.

howToBook.question: How do I book a consultation?
howToBook.answer: Several ways to get started: fill in the form on this page — our specialist will contact you within 24 hours; message us on WhatsApp or Telegram; or call us directly. The first consultation is free and without obligation. We recommend bringing any existing test results and medical records.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy and data protection policy of Miracle IVF clinic.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Miracle IVF clinic takes the protection of your personal data seriously. This policy explains what data is collected when you use our website, how it is used, and how it is stored.
privacy.s1Body: When you fill out the consultation request form, we collect: your full name, phone number, city (optional), service of interest (optional), and an additional message (optional). No personal data is collected during ordinary browsing of the site.
privacy.s2Body: Collected data is used solely to: contact you regarding your consultation request, provide information about our services, and process your enquiry. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.s3Body: All data is stored on secure encrypted servers. We apply modern security protocols to prevent unauthorised access to your data.
privacy.s4Body: Your data is accessible only to Miracle IVF clinic staff — medical and administrative personnel who require it to process your request. All staff are trained in data privacy practices.
privacy.s5Body: You may at any time request to view the data stored about you, request deletion of your data, and contact us to correct any inaccuracies.
privacy.s6Body: Our website uses Google Analytics and Meta Pixel analytics tools. These collect usage statistics but do not store personally identifying information. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.contactBody: If you have questions about our privacy policy, please contact us: phone +998 95 831 6333 or via the form on this page.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using the Miracle IVF clinic website.
terms.heading: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use govern your use of the miracleivf.uz website. By using the site, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1Body: miracleivf.uz is the official informational website of Miracle IVF clinic. The site provides information about clinic services, specialists and the treatment process, and allows you to submit a consultation request.
terms.s2Body: All information on this site is provided for general informational purposes only. It is not a substitute for advice from a qualified medical professional. Always consult a doctor before making any medical decisions.
terms.s3Body: Completing the form submits a request for consultation. It does not guarantee a specific date or service. Our specialists will review your request and contact you within 24 hours.
terms.s4Body: All text, images, logos and other materials on this site are the property of Miracle IVF clinic and are protected by copyright. Copying or distribution without permission is prohibited.
terms.s5Body: Our site may contain links to third-party services (Google Maps, WhatsApp, Telegram, social networks). We are not responsible for the privacy policies or terms of use of those services.
terms.s6Body: Miracle IVF clinic reserves the right to amend these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on the site. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of the amended terms.
terms.contactBody: For questions about these terms, contact us: phone +998 95 831 6333 or via the form on this page.
